response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience and proven ability to build large-scale systems (millions of req/sec at Dunnhumby), but lacks the specific domain expertise this role demands. No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or measurement infrastructure—the core of this Principal-level position. Missing key qualifications: Python proficiency, statistical/data analysis background, and any track record in growth metrics or experimental design. Fundamentally capable but positioned in the wrong domain.
strengths: Extensive multi-language engineering background across 15+ years with consistent progression to senior/staff levels
Deep hands-on expertise with high-performance, large-scale systems (millions of requests/second) and real-time data optimization
Currently working on AI infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, demonstrating engagement with modern engineering challenges
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing systems, or feature-flagging infrastructure—core to this role
Missing statistical analysis, metrics infrastructure, and experimental design background despite high data aptitude being a key requirement
Python not listed despite being a required language; no evidence of multi-region distributed systems or global high-availability architecture

key_factors.factor: Metrics, statistics, and data analysis background
